title: Owner-scoped project CRUD with task cascade delete
body:
## Goal
Add create/list/fetch/delete for projects, scoped to the authenticated owner, with deletion cascading to the project's tasks and no cross-user data leakage.

## Changes
- {"path":"src/routes/projects.js","assumption":"creates"}
- {"path":"tests/projects.test.js","assumption":"creates"}

## Acceptance
- [ ] A signed-in user POSTing to /projects with {"name"} receives the created project as {id, name, ownerId, createdAt} with ownerId set to the caller.
- [ ] GET /projects returns a JSON array containing only the calling user's projects and none belonging to any other user.
- [ ] GET /projects/:id returns the caller's project; requesting a project owned by another user returns 404/403 and leaks no project data.
- [ ] DELETE /projects/:id deletes the caller's project and also removes all tasks that belonged to it; deleting another user's project is refused with 404/403.
- [ ] All /projects endpoints require a valid bearer token and respond with 401 when it is missing or invalid.

## Verify
- node --test tests/projects.test.js (contract)
- npm run typecheck (validate)

> 🏷️ Authored with Mandrel v0.0.0 · 2026-07-12

<!-- meta: {"reason_to_exist":"Project ownership is the core per-user isolation boundary and the parent scope tasks live under (b: isolates the ownership-isolation boundary into its own reviewable unit).","mandrel_version":"0.0.0","authored_at":"2026-07-12"} -->
